name: Spiced Rhubarb-Strawberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Pumpkin pie spice or ground mace
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry for a 2-crust pie.
2. Combine the rhubarb (cut into 3/4-inch pieces) and strawberries in a bowl.
3. Sprinkle sugar, flour, salt, and pumpkin pie spice over the fruit mixture; mix gently.
4. Place the mixture into the prepared pastry-lined 9-inch pie pan.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Add lattice top and flute the edges.
7. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 40 minutes, or until the crust is browned and juices bubble.
8. Cool on a rack.
